};

        if (n <= 1) return n;
        if (memo.find(n) != memo.end()) {

        int option1 = (n % 2) + 1 + minDaysHelper(n / 2, memo);
        int option2 = (n % 3) + 1 + minDaysHelper(n / 3, memo);
        memo[n] = std::min(option1, option2);
        return memo[n];

};

class Solution {
public:
    int minDays(int n) {
        // Use a helper function with memoization
        std::unordered_map<int, int> memo;
        return minDaysHelper(n, memo);
    }
    
    int minDaysHelper(int n, std::unordered_map<int, int>& memo) {
        if (n <= 1) return n;
        if (memo.find(n) != memo.end()) return memo[n];
        int option1 = n % 2 + 1 + minDaysHelper(n / 2, memo);
        int option2 = n % 3 + 1 + minDaysHelper(n / 3, memo);
        memo[n] = std::min(option1, option2);
        return memo[n];
    }
};
